name: Cartesia Speech
description: OpenClaw speech provider for Cartesia Sonic-2. Supports instant voice cloning, voice notes (OGG/Opus via ffmpeg), and audio files (MP3). Free and pay-as-you-go tiers via api.cartesia.ai.

suppressDuplicateText.title: Suppress duplicate text reply on voice surfaces
suppressDuplicateText.description: When true, the plugin registers a message_sending hook that cancels the channel's text reply if the same turn just produced a Cartesia voice-note synthesis. Result: voice-only output, no text+voice duplicate. Default: false (sends both).
